misc: If not on the course, he is probably billing clients
biography: Lassi is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game. Representing Lakeside Golf Vammala, Lassi is a formidable competitor.

Beyond the golf course, Lassi practices law. It is often said that if he is not on the course, he is probably billing clients. The discipline and precision he brings to his legal work are also evident in his golfing style.

In past Hector Trophée events, Lassi has always presented a challenge to his fellow competitors. He has yet to secure a Hector Trophée victory, but he did win the Victor Trophy once. While Lassi will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, fans are hoping he will return to competition in the future.
